mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL_REQ WHERE approval_document_id LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_REQ ( approval_document_id, document_title, reference_table_name, reference_id, requester, request_date, attachment_count, request_comment, reg_date, register ) VALUES ( #{approvalDocumentId}, #{documentTitle}, #{referenceTableName}, #{referenceId}, #{requester}, NOW(), #{attachmentCount}, #{requestComment}, NOW(), #{register} )
mapper.select: SELECT emp_id AS empId, emp_name AS empName, pos_id AS posId, dep_name AS depName FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_LINE_TEMPLATE ( template_id, template_name, owner_id, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{templateName}, #{ownerId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT a.template_id, a.approval_order, a.approver_id, a.approver_role, e.emp_name AS empName, d.dep_name AS depName, e.pos_id AS posId FROM APP_LINE_TEMPLATE_DETAIL a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.approver_id = e.emp_id JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.dep_id = d.dep_id WHERE a.template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY a.approval_order
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APP_LINE_TEMPLATE WHERE template_name = #{templateName}

SELECT t.template_id, t.template_name, d.template_id AS d_template_id, d.approval_order, d.approver_id, d.approver_role, e.emp_name, e.dep_name, e.pos_id FROM APP_LINE_TEMPLATE t LEFT JOIN APP_LINE_TEMPLATE_DETAIL d ON t.template_id = d.template_id LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON d.approver_id = e.emp_id WHERE t.owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY t.template_id, d.approval_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_LINE ( approval_line_id, approval_document_id, approval_order, approver_id, approver_role, reg_date, register ) VALUES ( #{approvalLineId}, #{approvalDocumentId}, #{approvalOrder}, #{approverId}, #{approverRole}, NOW(), #{register} )
mapper.select: SELECT pos_id FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEAVE_REQ ( leave_id, emp_id, leave_status, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_days, approval_confirmed ) VALUES ( #{leaveId}, #{empId}, #{leaveStatus}, #{leaveStartDate}, #{leaveEndDate}, #{leaveDays}, #{approvalConfirmed} )

INSERT INTO BUSINESS_REQ ( business_trip_id, emp_id, trip_location, business_trip_purpose, business_trip_start, business_trip_end, approval_confirmed ) VALUES ( #{businessTripId}, #{empId}, #{tripLocation}, #{businessTripPurpose}, #{businessTripStart}, #{businessTripEnd}, #{approvalConfirmed} )
mapper.select: SELECT ar.approval_document_id, ar.document_title, ar.request_date, ar.requester, e.emp_name AS requester_name, d.dep_name AS requester_dept, e.pos_id AS requester_position, al.approval_order, al.approval_line_id, al.approver_id, al.approver_role, aa.approval_status AS approval_status FROM APPROVAL_REQ ar JOIN APPROVAL_LINE al ON ar.approval_document_id = al.approval_document_id JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON ar.requester = e.emp_id JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON CAST(e.dep_id AS UNSIGNED) = d.dep_id LEFT JOIN APPROVAL_APP aa ON aa.approval_document_id = al.approval_document_id AND aa.approver_id = al.approver_id WHERE al.approver_id = #{approverId} AND ( ( al.approval_order = ( SELECT MIN(al2.approval_order) FROM APPROVAL_LINE al2 LEFT JOIN APPROVAL_APP aa2 ON al2.approval_document_id = aa2.approval_document_id AND al2.approver_id = aa2.approver_id WHERE al2.approval_document_id = ar.approval_document_id AND aa2.approval_id IS NULL ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM APPROVAL_APP aa3 WHERE aa3.approval_document_id = al.approval_document_id AND aa3.approver_id = #{approverId} ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM APPROVAL_APP aa4 JOIN APPROVAL_LINE al4 ON aa4.approver_id = al4.approver_id AND aa4.approval_document_id = al4.approval_document_id WHERE aa4.approval_status = '반려' AND al4.approval_document_id = ar.approval_document_id AND al4.approval_order < al.approval_order ) ORDER BY ar.request_date DESC
SELECT * FROM APPROVAL_APP WHERE approval_document_id = #{approvalDocumentId}
SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, d.dep_name AS depName, e.pos_id AS posId FROM EMPLOYEE e JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON CAST(e.dep_id AS UNSIGNED) = d.dep_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}

SELECT file_id AS fileId, file_name AS fileName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType, reference_table_id AS referenceTableId, reference_table_name AS referenceTableName, upload_date AS uploadDate, file_description AS fileDescription FROM FILE WHERE reference_table_id = #{referenceId}

SELECT approval_line_id, approval_document_id, approval_order, approver_id, approver_role, approval_status, reg_date, register FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE approval_document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY approval_order

SELECT approval_document_id AS approvalDocumentId, document_title AS documentTitle, reference_table_name AS referenceTableName, reference_id AS referenceId, requester, attachment_count AS attachmentCount, request_comment AS requestComment, register FROM APPROVAL_REQ WHERE approval_document_id = #{approvalDocumentId}

SELECT leave_id AS leaveId, emp_id AS empId, leave_status AS leaveStatus, leave_start_date AS leaveStartDate, leave_end_date AS leaveEndDate, leave_days AS leaveDays, approval_confirmed AS approvalConfirmed FROM LEAVE_REQ WHERE leave_id = #{approvalDocumentId}

SELECT business_trip_id AS businessTripId, emp_id AS empId, trip_location AS tripLocation, business_trip_purpose AS businessTripPurpose, business_trip_start AS businessTripStart, business_trip_end AS businessTripEnd, approval_confirmed AS approvalConfirmed FROM BUSINESS_REQ WHERE business_trip_id = #{approvalDocumentId}

SELECT file_id AS fileId, file_name AS fileName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType, reference_table_id AS referenceTableId, reference_table_name AS referenceTableName, upload_date AS uploadDate, file_description AS fileDescription FROM FILE WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_APP ( approval_id, approval_document_id, approver_id, approval_order, approval_status, approval_date, approval_comment, reg_date, register, mod_date, modifier ) VALUES ( #{approvalLineId}, #{approvalDocumentId}, #{approverId}, #{approvalOrder}, #{approvalStatus}, NOW(), #{comment}, NOW(), #{register}, NOW(), #{modifier} )
mapper.select: SELECT approval_line_id, approval_document_id, approval_order, approver_id, approver_role, approval_status, reg_date, register FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE approval_document_id = #{approvalDocumentId} ORDER BY approval_order
SELECT approval_status FROM APPROVAL_APP WHERE approval_document_id = #{approvalDocumentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE LEAVE_REQ SET approval_confirmed = TRUE WHERE leave_id = #{leaveId}
UPDATE BUSINESS_REQ SET approval_confirmed = TRUE WHERE business_trip_id = #{tripId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE approval_document_id = #{approvalDocumentId} AND approval_status = '승인'
